reviewer: AAI Code Review (independent re-review, model claude-sonnet-5)

fix_verification.detail: const info = Object.hasOwn(spec, f) ? spec[f] : undefined; replaces plain spec[f] access; excludes inherited Object.prototype members.
'clear' added to MULTI_FLAGS; resolveClearList merges all occurrences into one deduped list; contradiction/unknown-field check spans every occurrence.

fieldSpan joins a blank run into the span only when the next non-blank line is more-indented than the field; otherwise still breaks at the blank as before. Bounded by findBlock's block-scoping so it cannot bleed across a top-level block boundary.

probes.prototype_chain_probe: 24/24 combinations (toString, __proto__, constructor, valueOf, hasOwnProperty, isPrototypeOf x 4 subcommands) -> exit 2, byte-identical fixture. E1 confirmed dead.
probes.w1_reprobe: --clear branch --clear path -> both nulled (exit 0); --clear branch --clear branch -> single deduped line; single --clear branch (no repeat) still works, path untouched.
probes.w1_overcorrection_contradiction: --clear branch --clear path --branch newbranch -> exit 2, contradiction message, byte-identical. Accumulation did not weaken the contradiction guard.
probes.w2_reprobe: hand-edited code_review.notes >- with blank-line paragraph, --clear notes -> notes: null, no orphan; PyYAML confirms notes == None.
probes.w2_overcorrection_sibling: field(>-) / blank / same-indent sibling key in same block -> clearing the field leaves the sibling untouched, span stops correctly at the blank.
probes.w2_overcorrection_trailing_blank: field as last line of a block, trailing blank before next top-level block -> overwrite leaves the blank intact and the next block completely untouched; findBlock bounds blockLines so cross-block bleed is structurally impossible.
probes.setfield_overwrite_sideeffect: overwriting (not clearing) a hand-edited >- field with a blank-line paragraph via --notes also correctly consumes the whole span, no orphan (PyYAML confirms new value).
probes.check_state: exit 0 (OK, exactly one of every top-level key) on all mutated probe fixtures

remaining_findings.note: live STATE legacy stranded spec_path at docs/ai/STATE.yaml:37 still present by design (in-place update policy); cosmetic, non-blocking
generic message for non-status guarded-field refusals; spec does not mandate the reset-block hint outside status
